No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Transferred to court's discovery calendar on July 23, 2024.

Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Michael C. Foley, Esq., BOWMAN AND BROOKE LLP, (408) 279-5393, for Defendant.

RE: PLAINTIFF CHRISTINE DEGRACIA'S Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents.

Counsel for Plaintiff had checked-in with the Discovery Clerk via Zoom prior to the start of the hearings. At the time that the pro tem Judge called the matter, Plaintiff counsel was not present via Zoom. The court takes the matter off calendar.

Judge Pro Tem: William C. Lynn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
